mode_options.auto_analysis: agent visually checks each snapshot itself against data/troubleshooting.json (needs a vision-capable model)
mode_options.screenshot_only: agent just posts snapshots + status for the user to judge (use for non-vision/local models)

defaults._note: Flashforge PLA Silk - tuned exists (lower nozzle temp + more retraction, fixes light stringing seen on the sink-strainer print) but is not auto-selected -- pick it explicitly next time PLA Silk is used.
